_meta.name: DerLg Vibe Booking — AI Agent Tool Registry
_meta.description: All backend API tools available to the Vibe Booking LangGraph AI agent. Tools are grouped by module. Each tool includes method, path, auth requirements, parameters, and what it returns.

auth.user: Bearer JWT in Authorization header (15-min expiry)

trip_discovery.name: list_trips
trip_discovery.description: Browse curated Cambodia trip packages. Use when the user asks about travel itineraries or tours. Filter by category (Temples, Nature, Culture, Adventure, Food), location, price, or duration.

trip_discovery.name: get_trip_detail
trip_discovery.description: Get full trip details including daily itinerary, included/excluded items, meeting point, and cancellation policy. Use when the user selects a trip or wants deeper info.

trip_discovery.name: get_related_trips
trip_discovery.description: Get trips in the same category/location as a given trip. Use for 'You might also like' recommendations.

trip_discovery.name: global_search
trip_discovery.description: Full-text search across trips, places, hotels, and guides. Use for general user queries. Returns grouped results by entity type.

trip_discovery.name: get_trip_reviews
trip_discovery.description: Get paginated reviews and average rating for a trip. Verified reviews include a badge.

trip_discovery.name: get_user_favorite_trips
trip_discovery.description: Get the authenticated user's saved/wishlisted trips for personalized recommendations.

hotel_booking.name: list_hotels
hotel_booking.description: Search hotels in Cambodia by location, price, star rating, or amenities. Returns paginated summaries with pricing.

hotel_booking.name: get_hotel_detail
hotel_booking.description: Get full hotel details including all room types, gallery, policies, and check-in/check-out times.

hotel_booking.name: check_hotel_room_availability
hotel_booking.description: Check real-time availability and total price for a room. Always call before creating a hotel booking.

hotel_booking.name: create_hotel_booking
hotel_booking.description: Create a hotel booking with 15-minute hold (HOLD status). Use after confirming availability and user consent. Requires auth.

hotel_booking.name: get_hotel_booking
hotel_booking.description: Get hotel booking details and current status (HOLD | PENDING_PAYMENT | CONFIRMED | CANCELLED | EXPIRED).

hotel_booking.name: cancel_hotel_booking
hotel_booking.description: Cancel a hotel booking. Refund based on cancellation policy. Confirm with user before calling.

transportation.name: list_vehicles
transportation.description: Search transportation vehicles (VAN, BUS, TUK_TUK, PRIVATE_CAR). Filter by type, capacity, AC, and date range.

transportation.name: get_vehicle_detail
transportation.description: Get full vehicle details including specs, photos, and pricing. Driver info revealed 24h before booking.

transportation.name: check_vehicle_availability
transportation.description: Check vehicle availability for a date range and get a price estimate. Always call before booking.

transportation.name: create_transportation_booking
transportation.description: Book a vehicle with 15-minute hold. Requires pickup and dropoff locations. Requires auth.

transportation.name: list_transportation_bookings
transportation.description: List the user's transportation bookings. Filter by status.

transportation.name: get_transportation_booking
transportation.description: Get details of a specific transport booking. Driver info revealed 24h before start date.

transportation.name: cancel_transportation_booking
transportation.description: Cancel transport booking. Tiered refund: 100% if ≥7 days, 50% if 1–7 days, 0% if <24h before.

tour_guide.name: list_guides
tour_guide.description: Browse verified tour guides. Filter by language (EN/ZH/KM), specialty, location, gender, verification, and price. Key for finding Chinese-speaking guides.

tour_guide.name: get_guide_detail
tour_guide.description: Get a guide's full profile including bio, experience, certifications, gallery, and verified reviews.

tour_guide.name: check_guide_availability
tour_guide.description: Check guide availability for a date range and get price estimate (daily rate × days). Always call before booking.

tour_guide.name: create_guide_booking
tour_guide.description: Book a guide with 15-minute hold. Contact details revealed 24h before start. Requires auth.

tour_guide.name: get_guide_booking
tour_guide.description: Get details of a specific guide booking and its current status.

tour_guide.name: cancel_guide_booking
tour_guide.description: Cancel a guide booking. Refund depends on cancellation policy and timing. Confirm with user first.

explore_places.name: list_places
explore_places.description: Browse Cambodia places of interest by category (Temple, Museum, Nature, Market, Beach, Mountain) and province.

explore_places.name: get_place_detail
explore_places.description: Get full place details including description, visitor tips, dress code, opening hours, and GPS coordinates.

explore_places.name: get_nearby_places_by_coordinates
explore_places.description: Find places near GPS coordinates within a radius. Use when user shares location or asks 'what is near me?'

explore_places.name: get_trips_visiting_place
explore_places.description: Get trip packages that include a specific place in their itinerary.

vibe_booking_ai_tools._note: These endpoints use X-Service-Key auth (internal AI-to-backend). Not user-facing JWT.

tools.name: ai_search_trips
tools.description: AI-native semantic trip search using a natural language query. Prefer this over list_trips when the user's intent needs semantic matching (e.g., 'relaxing beach trip under $200').

tools.name: ai_create_booking_hold
tools.description: Create a multi-item booking hold (TRIP + HOTEL + TRANSPORT + GUIDE) from the AI chat in one call. Use after user confirms intent to book.

tools.name: ai_generate_payment_qr
tools.description: Generate BAKONG or ABA QR payment from the chat. Display qr_image_url to the user for scanning.

tools.name: ai_estimate_budget
tools.description: Estimate total trip budget from a natural language query. Returns min/max with category breakdown (accommodation, transport, meals, entry_fees, guide, misc).

bookings.name: create_booking
bookings.description: Unified booking creation endpoint for any item type (TRIP, HOTEL, TRANSPORT, GUIDE). Creates a 15-minute hold. Use for multi-item bookings.

bookings.name: list_bookings
bookings.description: List all bookings for the authenticated user. Filter by upcoming, past, cancelled, or all.

bookings.name: get_booking_detail
bookings.description: Get full booking details including all items, total price, hold expiry, and cancellation info.

bookings.name: cancel_booking
bookings.description: Cancel any booking. Always confirm with the user before calling — cancellation may be irreversible.

bookings.name: get_booking_qr
bookings.description: Get the QR code for a confirmed booking (for check-in at hotel, tour, or transport pickup).

payments.name: create_payment_intent
payments.description: Create a Stripe payment intent for card-based payment. Supports discount codes and loyalty point redemption.

payments.name: generate_payment_qr
payments.description: Generate a BAKONG or ABA QR code for payment. Display qr_image_url in the conversation for user to scan.

payments.name: get_payment_status
payments.description: Poll payment status after QR scan or card submission. Status: PENDING | SUCCEEDED | FAILED | REFUNDED.

payments.name: validate_discount_code
payments.description: Validate a promo/discount code and calculate discount amount before applying. Returns is_valid, discount_amount_usd, and user-facing message.

loyalty.name: get_loyalty_balance
loyalty.description: Get the user's loyalty points balance, USD equivalent, and expiry warnings. Use before checkout.

loyalty.name: calculate_loyalty_redemption
loyalty.description: Preview how much discount X points gives against a booking subtotal. Points must be multiples of 100, min 100.

loyalty.name: get_loyalty_transactions
loyalty.description: Get loyalty points transaction history (EARNED, REDEEMED, ADJUSTED, EXPIRED).

emergency.name: send_sos_alert
emergency.description: Send SOS alert with GPS coordinates to DerLg support. Use ONLY for real emergencies (SOS, MEDICAL, THEFT, LOST). Triggers push + SMS to support team.

emergency.name: get_emergency_contacts
emergency.description: Look up Police, Hospital, Fire, and Tourist Police contacts for a Cambodia province or GPS location.

emergency.name: create_location_share
emergency.description: Create a shareable live location link for safety (24h or 72h duration). Returns a URL to share with family/friends.

festivals.name: list_festivals
festivals.description: List upcoming Cambodia cultural festivals. Filter by month, year, province, or category (Religious, Cultural, National, Regional).

festivals.name: get_festival_detail
festivals.description: Get festival details including description, history, travel tips, and any associated discount code.

festivals.name: get_festival_related_trips
festivals.description: Get bookable trip packages themed around a specific festival.

user_profile.name: get_current_user_profile
user_profile.description: Get the authenticated user's profile: name, preferred language (EN/ZH/KM), student_status, loyalty_balance, and emergency contacts. Call at conversation start for personalization.
